name: @ruleoak/openclaw-adapter
description: Optional OpenClaw-style adapter for RuleOak-compatible permission checks, evidence records, and action replay. Not an official OpenClaw integration.

scripts.test: node tests/openclaw-adapter.test.js && node tests/openclaw-adapter-v1.test.js && node tests/normalize-action.test.js && node tests/risk-classification.test.js && node tests/policy-evaluation.test.js && node tests/jsonl-sink.test.js && node tests/middleware.test.js && node tests/approval-callback.test.js && node tests/replay.test.js && node tests/examples.test.js && node tests/no-official-claim.test.js && node tests/policy-specificity.test.js
scripts.examples:all: node examples/basic-middleware/run.js && node examples/file-delete-blocked/run.js && node examples/shell-command-approval/run.js && node examples/database-mutation-approval/run.js && node examples/email-send-approval/run.js && node examples/mcp-dangerous-tool/run.js && node examples/risky-skill-install/run.js && node examples/poisoned-context/run.js && node examples/evidence-output/run.js && node examples/replay/run.js
